summary:
## ⚡ Quick Summary CyberLaw Firm is a 21st-century law firm specializing in privacy, cybersecurity, and data protection for individuals and corporate clients, handling cases from data breaches and hacking to cyber harassment and identity theft. ## Key Facts | Field | Details | |-------|---------| | **Company Name** | CyberLaw Firm (also operating as The CyberLaw Group) | | **What They Do** | Law firm focused on privacy, data security, and cybersecurity legal services for both individuals and corporate clients. Handles cases involving hacking, data breaches, malware, ransomware, cyber harassment, cyber bullying, cyber stalking, revenge porn, cyber fraud, identity theft, doxing, defamation, computer fraud, and claims under Maryland and federal privacy laws. | | **Founder/Principal Attorney** | Arnold J. Abraham, Esq. — former senior executive in DoD, DHS, and ODNI with over 30 years in national security, cyber security, and intelligence. | | **Location(s)** | Serving Baltimore, Annapolis, and Washington DC. Physical address: 220 N Liberty St, Baltimore, MD, United States, Maryland. | | **Contact Info** | Phone: (443) 906-3495
Email: info@thecyberlawteam.com
Website: thecyberlawteam.com | | **Hours** | Monday–Friday, 9 AM – 6 PM | | **Fee Structure** | Hourly rate, flat rate, or contingency fee (no upfront fee for qualifying contingency cases). | | **Social Media** | Facebook page: "CyberLaw Firm" with 431 likes. |
